description_long: This is a plush doll with a large, round head and a small, seated body. The doll has pale skin, large teal eyes, and a neutral facial expression. It wears a green dress with white frills, a white blouse, and a large black bow on the side of its head. The doll's hair is short, straight, and white, with blunt bangs. It holds a black and white object resembling a sword or stick, and a white, fluffy ball is attached to its side. The overall appearance is soft and stylized, with a distinct anime influence.
description: A plush anime-style doll with white hair, teal eyes, a green dress, and a large black bow, holding a black and white stick with a fluffy white ball.
description_view_0: The back and top of the doll are visible, showing the large black bow and the back of the green dress.
description_view_1: The front of the doll is visible, highlighting the teal eyes, white hair, green dress, and the black and white stick held in its right hand.
description_view_2: The left side of the doll is shown, displaying the profile of the face, the stick, and the fluffy white ball attached to the side.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the back of the head, the black bow, and the stick with the fluffy ball extending outward.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll wears a green dress with white frilled trim, a white blouse with puffed sleeves, and a large black bow on the side of the head, reflecting a classic anime maid or fantasy character style.
attribute_pose: The doll is in a seated position with legs bent forward, arms slightly extended, and head facing forward. One arm holds a stick-like object, and a fluffy ball is attached to the side.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a neutral facial expression with large teal eyes, a small straight mouth, and no visible eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight, white hair with blunt bangs and a large black bow on the side.
